blocked_reasons: Source bucket scope could not be proven for S3 access logging; review the affected bucket relationship manually.
non_runnable_reasons.decision_summary: Family resolver downgraded S3.9 to destination-safety review. Source bucket scope could not be proven for S3 access logging; review the affected bucket relationship manually. Run creation did not require additional risk-only acceptance.
non_runnable_reasons.title: S3 general purpose buckets should have server access logging enabled
